name: The end of the guarded hall
description:
You are at the end of the hall. Colored doors line the walls to the north. To
your west, you see a &Ggreen&n door. To your east, you see a &Ccyan&n door. The hall
itself leads north back along the rows of doors.

extra_descriptions.description: You see a brown door here. It has the name "Belrak" written on it.
You see a grey door here. It has the name "Dorgar" written on it.
